Here's one friendly good ole' boy with people, dogs and even outdoor cats..

He'll won't even destroy toys and balls left around by the kids or other dogs. His thing is exploring and he has plenty of spirit and pep for walks, hikes, and conducting recognizance in his yard space. See his short video here. He'll be keeping an ear up waiting for you to come by to meet him. Till then, much love.

name: Azuki
description_html:
Meet this sweet young boy looking for his forever home!

He is an incredibly friendly, calm, and loving dog who truly enjoys being around people. He gets along well with other dogs, is not aggressive at all, and is very non-reactive — he rarely barks and handles new environments, noises, rain, and other dogs with confidence and ease.

He already knows some commands, such as sit, stay, wait, go, and lay down, and he is very food motivated, which makes continued training easy and rewarding. He rides beautifully in the car, sits calmly during trips, and enjoys being by your side wherever you are.

While he does not enjoy being confined to a kennel, he absolutely loves relaxing on the couch or curling up on a comfy dog bed. He is affectionate without being overwhelming — he loves cuddles and belly rubs, stays close to his people, and has a calm, comforting presence. He’s the kind of companion who simply enjoys being near you.

Healthy, vaccinated, neutered, and ready to start his next chapter, he is looking for a loving home where he can finally settle in and be part of the family.

name: Kilo
description_html:
With a big smile and a heart to match, Kilo is ready to capture yours! This handsome, tan-and-white pup is the ultimate cuddle machine. If there’s an open spot next to you on the couch, expect Kilo to fill it instantly. He loves affection, especially belly rubs! 

He’s not just a professional snuggler, though—he’s got the brains to back up the beauty. Kilo is a certified smarty-pants who already knows sit, shake, and down. He loves to show off his tricks for treats! He is also great on a leash and generally pretty easygoing. Ready for a loyal, intelligent, extra-cuddly best friend? Kilo is your guy.

name: Hugo
description_html: Hugo is a friendly, playful guy who loves to go on long walks with his favorite people. He's an absolute cuddler, too! This smart boy knows basic commands like "sit" & "stay". Hugo's favorite activities are splashing in water and going for car rides. He appreciates a calmer home environment and may do best in a home without small children.

name: Cherry
description_html: Cherry & Truffle came in together and love each other very much so they must be adopted together! Cherry is very loyal and loving. She enjoys being close to her people without the need to be on top of them! Truffle will steal pets from you and soak up all your attention. They both love window watching. These girls are in need of some TLC today!

name: Truffle
description_html: Cherry & Truffle came in together and love each other very much so they must be adopted together! Cherry is very loyal and loving. She enjoys being close to her people without the need to be on top of them! Truffle will steal pets from you and soak up all your attention. They both love window watching. These girls are in need of some TLC today!

name: Chirp (Petco)
description_html:
Chirp is available for adoption at Petco Lakeline! Go there to meet her today.


Chirp loves to snuggle and get all the pets! Just as her name suggests, she will chirp out for your attention. She's mellow, affectionate, friendly and checks all the boxes. This girl is a volunteer and staff favorite and she's ready to get into a loving home today!

name: Gorgonzola
description_html:
Gorgonzola is a charming pup who is just as delightful as his name suggests! He has a bright, infectious smile and cute ears that suggest he’s always ready for an adventure. He has a unique colored coat (similar to his namesake cheese) and striking eyes, making this guy truly one of a kind.  

Gorgonzola is the ultimate companion; he is incredibly cuddly and truly loves to stay close to his favorite humans. Whether you are relaxing at home or heading out for a stroll, he is a dream on a leash. While he enjoys a slightly playful romp, his true specialty is providing unconditional love and endless snuggles. Meet this sweet boy today and see if you’re his forever.

name: Layna
description_html: Layna is an itty bitty pocket pitty mix. She is a sweet mama who loves to sit with you and get pets and kisses. She is chill and gets along with dogs.

name: Lana
description_html:
Lana is a sweet and calm companion with a big heart for her people. She loves pets and is happy to lay nearby as you go about your routine. But get her in a playful mood, and she has a goofy side too! She never looks happier than when she’s chasing squirrels around the yard, and her soft ears perk up watching them in the trees - those pesky critters!


Lana is a smart girl who picks up commands quickly. She already knows sit and shake (paw), and is learning stay and come. She is house trained, respects the home, and does well with long periods alone - especially with a frozen Kong! She walks beautifully on the leash without tugging, but can get excited when she sees other dogs. 


While incredibly sweet and loyal with her known humans, Lana is still learning how to trust new people. She is curious about some house guests but mostly wants to observe from a safe distance. She has built a lot of confidence in a short time since coming into her foster home. A patient and loving adopter could help her blossom even more!

name: Mingus
description_html: Mingus ia a little love bug! He enjoys cuddling, purring, exploring, and playing with his brother and our large dog. He has recovered from an upper respiratory infection and is still getting a little medication for his left eye.

name: Phoenix
description_html: Phoenix is a very sweet boy. He purrs as soon as I come in the room. He enjoys playing with his brother and is working on his relationships with our large, too friendly dog.

name: Tessa
description_html:
Tessa was found as a stray by some kind members of the community, but they could not keep her long term. In the home, she was very affectionate and eager to stay close to her people. Tessa was a peaceful presence, completely housetrained, furniture friendly and ready to lounge with her friends and get lots of snuggles. She has shown curiosity toward dogs and calm children with slow introductions. Tessa is a playful girl and hasn't met a squeaky toy she didn't like. Ask staff to meet this girl today and prepare to fall in love!


Tessa is a very sweet, slightly shy dog. She’s very housetrained and pulls slightly when we start our walk. She seems curious about other dogs but isn’t reactive. She loves a long, sniffy walk and running around the play yard. Would probably do best in a quieter home and would love a yard, but can likely do an apartment. She has a very sweet demeanor and checks in for pets regularly

name: White Cheddar Cheezit
description_html:
White Cheddar Cheezit, or Cheesy for short, demonstrated his loving deameanor and won everyone over during his foster stay. A self-proclaimed 50lb lap dog who loves cuddles and pets, he would occasionally try to climb onto your lap to soak up your affection.


At only 11 months of age, Cheesy is surprisingly calm; he is fantastic at entertaining himself with a rotation of toys and puzzles, and a frozen Kong with peanut butter and kibbles will keep him busy for 15 minutes. He especially loves squeaky toys and will carry them around to show off. Cheesy also LOVES playing fetch with bouncy balls or squeaky toys, and will pass out within 15 minutes of it. When playtime is over, Cheesy settles beautifully and loves napping by your side. He loves his people and is a little bit of a velcro dog!


Cheesy would thrive in a home with a yard, but he has demonstrated superb apartment-living skills in his foster's 4th-floor studio apartment. Apartment dwellers may find it helpful to take him for longer walks/runs and play sessions to burn off his puppy energy. Cheesy is happy to join you on any adventures!


Cheesy is a highly adaptive puppy. He takes the elevator easily and is getting very good at sitting and staying until you say "free," focusing on you even with other people in the elevator! He is also comfortable in a car, jumping straight into his designated seat the moment the door opens.


Cheesy's high food motivation and eagerness to please make him easy to train. He already knows sit and down, and is easily directed into the crate with some food. He is also perfecting his 'stay', 'leave it', 'drop it', and 'come here'. Cheesy sleeps in his crate overnight and will occasionally go in to nap. Cheesy also likes being brushed and will roll over for belly rubs whenever you walk by.


Other than being the bestest boy on Earth, Cheesy is also potty- and leash-trained. He has not had a single accident since joining his foster's apartment. He is also known for being amazing on the leash, rarely pulling, and easily directed with a call or a tug. He has not reacted to kids, bikes, people, big dogs, or small dogs. He has beautiful social skills and is eager to play with friendly dogs. He may get carried away staring at a squirrel or a lizard, but a gentle but firm tug and some positive reinforcement will get him to move on, as with anything else he is fixated on.


If you have a feeling Cheesy might be the one, please reach out for a meet-and-greet! He will be so excited to see you.

name: Esperanza
description_html:
Meet Esperanza! She was initially shy in the shelter, but she's come out of her shell with the help of her feline friends. She loves the company of other cats, and she now enjoys greeting new people each day and getting lots of pets.

Esperanza is easy going and affectionate, and ready to add a little joy to each day with a lucky family.

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Esperanza and ALL Desperate Housecats/Cactus Cats!

name: Murphy
description_html:
Murphy is a gentle giant with a heart of gold. His favorite things in life are simple: comfy beds, cozy couches, sniffy walks, and spending time with his people. He's calm and easygoing around the house, but he'll happily show off his playful side when he's feeling excited. He's also done great riding elevators, making him a good companion for apartment living.

While Murphy can be a little cautious in new situations and around some unfamiliar sounds, he warms up quickly and is wonderfully sweet with new people. Once he feels comfortable, he's an affectionate cuddle bug who loves being close to his humans. Despite being a big boy, he's done great riding elevators and settling into apartment life, though he'd also love a backyard where he can sniff around, stretch his legs, and enjoy the sunshine.

Murphy walks beautifully on a leash, does great in the car, does well when left alone for a few hours, and is highly motivated by treats. During his time at the shelter, he also did well with the dogs he met, including a younger pup who looked a lot like him.

If you're looking for a loyal companion who enjoys leisurely walks, afternoon naps, and plenty of couch time, Murphy may be your perfect match. ❤️

name: Mariposa
description_html: Mariposa is a sweet, affectionate pup who is very housetrained and walks welll on leash. She loves to romp around the playyard, jump in the doggie pool, and run along the fence line playing with other friendly dogs. Mariposa is a beautiful dog both inside and out. Come meet this special girl!

name: Butch
description_html:
Butch is a bouncy boy, purr monster and loves attention. He’s very playful and romped hard with his three brothers before they were adopted and now just with his sister. He’s medium-ish energy, maybe a little more as he grows. Use the email below to reach out to his foster directly for more information or to set up a meet/greet.

 

- Email: adaywithfosters@gmail.com

- Pictures & Info: https://www.instagram.com/adaywithfosters

 

Butch was shy when I got him, but he’s really opened up and now purrs big before you even pet him or pick him up… sometimes he purrs big enough to hear when you just talk to him. When he’s not zooming with his sibs, he loves attention and almost rolls on his back for belly rubs when you come up to him. I think in time, he might become a big purring lap cat.

 

During the day he played hard, zoomed and wrestle with his sibs or chase toys… all interchangeably with his brothers… basically, whoever was closest. He loves all toys- string, ping-pong balls, pieces of cardboard, springs and will come running at the sound of a rattle mouse. Once he’s played and worked out some of his energy, he’s a fairly chill boy and his super power is running up and flopping in front of you to be petted. So far, he hasn’t asked for a lap but he’s completely on board with being picked up and carried, even put on his back in your lap for belly rubs and games of belly tickle. Sometimes when he wakes up in a different room, he’ll ‘echo locate’ and meow to find out where you are. I’ll call back to him and he’ll come running to be in the same room. He’s very gentle when you play and hand wrestle, though he’s a little mouthy at this stage… wanting to chew on your fingers or toes in sandals. You can pick him up most any time and he’ll relax in your arms, unless he’s really busy and has things to do or a sibling to chase. If so, he’ll politely wiggle to get down and zoom off. He’s becoming a curious explorer and trying to jump on shelves, get into closets, etc., etc. After playing, he napped and slept interchangeably with his brothers and not just cuddles up with his sister. During the day, he sleeps on the sofa, on the pillows of the bed or high up on the cat tree in the office.

 

So far, he doesn’t talk much that I can tell, unless he wants to find you and then his voice is clear but soft. You can hear him calling when he accidentally gets locked in a closet when he dove in to explore, but he’s fairly quiet so far. He does meep pretty well at meal times. He climbs a tall sisal cat tree very well and sleeps up there often. Lately at night, without his brothers to zoom with in the late evenings, he’ll climb up on the bed while I read and often he’s sleeping at the foot of the bed when I wake up. I think he would do OK as a solo kitten for someone who works from home to give him a lot of attention. Or, I think would also do very well for a home who has an energetic kitten or cat who wants a buddy, since he’s used to wrestling and zooming with brothers… even a dog who would like an energetic playmate.

 

He is perfect with the litter box and think he covers his business fairly well. He’s getting better getting his nails trimmed and he’s a work in progress and we get the fronts done frequently… work in progress. He’s still shy with new people he’s never met and it takes a few minutes with toys, string, etc. to open up. I think could do fine with children once used to their energy. Butch is fine w/ my older cat and he sometimes tries to cuddle and often tries to wrestle with her. Also, I think he would do OK with a dog too, after slow introductions as I don’t know if he’s met a dog.

name: Naomi
description_html: Naomi is a very sweet cat who loves to CUDDLE. She loves pets and scratches under her chin and will even roll over to ask for belly scratches. It took her 2 days to really come out of her shell and now she loves to just hang out while you eat, get ready, or watch tv. If you’re looking for a sweet cat Naomi is perfect for you. She just wants to be with you at all times and sit in your lap.

name: Lyric
description_html:
Pretty Lyric is a sweet young dog who strolls along easily on leash and appears housetrained. She is friendly, affectionate, mellow and a wonderful companion. Lyric does keep an eye out for pesky squirrels on her walks. 🐿️


Come meet this special girl!

name: Kangaskhan
description_html: Kangaskhan is a good natured, affectionate lady who had to be surrendered due to housing restrictions. She is crate trained and walks very well on leash! She knows several commands in Spanish: sit, stay, down, come and paw. Besides snuggles with people, she also loves squeaky toys and chew bones. This laid back lady is ready to be your special new family member today!

name: Beauty
description_html: Beauty takes a moment to warm up, but she's sooo sweet! She is very playful and affectionate once she gets to know you. She loves to romp around the play yard and chase toys, then she's happy to settle in with some pets. Beauty has lived with dogs in the past so may do well with a canine companion in the home with proper introductions. This special lady is ready for her next adventure in a home today!

name: Stormie Rain
description_html:
Her name says it all - she's the best rainy day, cozy up, cuddle up with the blankies companion - she's long on comforts, and has a very relaxed viewpoint of life that makes having her around a breeze.


Come meet Stormie Rain in person between 11-7pm at her kennel. She's looking forward to the best of the rest of her life ahead of her.

Have a dog family member? Set up a meet and greet at the shelter.

See you soon?

name: Sage
description_html: Sage came in with several other cats from a difficult situation. They are all still learning to trust us, but we don't think it will take long for them to relax, especially once they are in a loving home! These kitties may need a patient adopter to help them through the transition. They can be adopted in pairs or may enjoy a feline friend in their new home.

name: Marmalade
description_html: Marmalade came in with several other cats from a difficult situation. They are all still learning to trust us, but we don't think it will take long for them to relax, especially once they are in a loving home! These kitties may need a patient adopter to help them through the transition. They can be adopted in pairs or may enjoy a feline friend in their new home.

name: Tangerine Dream
description_html: Tangerine Dream came in with several other cats from a difficult situation. They are all still learning to trust us, but we don't think it will take long for them to relax, especially once they are in a loving home! These kitties may need a patient adopter to help them through the transition. They can be adopted in pairs or may enjoy a feline friend in their new home.

name: Endora
description_html: Endora is playful and likes to talk. She is a brown tabby with small orange patches.

name: Bonus
description_html: Sweet and loves to talk. Inquisitive and fun! Loves to play

name: Ducky
description_html:
Meet Ducky! He's 16 lbs of pure joy, curiosity and spunk. At 4.5 years old, we don't know much about his backstory but we do know that he's resilient.


Ducky came to us after wandering to a strangers house with a severe and infected neck wound. We don't know how or why this happened, but we knew right away that this brave boy was something special.


He's currently living in foster, where he spends his days playing in the backyard, taking long walks through the neighborhood and watching Bravo on the couch with his foster mom. His favorite day would be filled with lots of sniffing, playing with puzzles and snuggles with his person.


He's housetrained, crate trained and non-destructive. He already knows sit and now that he has a little structure and routine, he's quickly picking up on more skills! We don't know how long Ducky was injured and alone on the streets, so he can be sensitive at times and would do best with a family that is patient and will respects his boundaries (please no kids under 12). He can get a little spooked by larger dogs when passing them on walks, so a home with a yard would be the best fit for him. With a little patience and love, Ducky will open up to you and show you his soft, affectionate side.


Interested in adopting Ducky? Fill out an application today!

name: Bruce
description_html:
Bruce shows us how much he loves and adores the people who care for him. He's very gentle. He asks only that you be sensitive with his heart and he'll reward you many times over.


He's smooth as silk on a leash.

He's crate trained, ideal for transitions and traveling to other's homes

Bruce will be neutered for adoption or while in foster care.

Are you ready to show a sweet dog all that life is supposed to be?

He's waiting to meet you..

name: Poppi
description_html:
Poppi is a soft, delicate little lady who will capture your heart.

She loves having a confident dog friend near and will thrive best in a home with a friendly dog who appreciates a little friend like her.

The hair at Poppi's back end is still regrowing in from her former sad life conditions. She's on standard skin medications through the end of May. Her condition is expected to fully recover, it just takes a little time for hair to regrow. If Poppi is your heart dog, don't delay due to a temporary condition that's already on the mend. She needs you, and your dog friend at home.

name: Sir Floofsalot
description_html:
Are you looking to adopt the physical incarnation of the cat from the movie "Flow"? Do you like being followed around more than just to the bathroom? Have you ever wondered what it's like to be groomed?

Meet Sir Floof! He is a full grown cat with the personality of a clingy kitten. He is extremely curious about the world and open to meeting all kinds of humans and animals. He's down to play 24/7, but also very willing to cuddle any time you're tired and decide to take a nap. Just be careful because he might start grooming you to show you how much he loves you. He picks up on routines quickly so he will surprise you with how soon he is able to predict breakfast, dinner and bed time. Because of his natural curiosity, confidence, and manners, he would be a perfect leash cat if you're looking to train a kitty to spend some time outdoors.

name: Patches
description_html: Patches is a kind, loving 12.5 year old Chihuahua who loves to go on short walks around the neighborhood, be close to his human, perfectly house-trained, loves kids, cats and dogs (once he meets them). He is content to lay around, go on car rides, or out and about with whatever your up to that day. He has come with me to dinners on the patio, out at Bouldin Acres and school pick-ups for the kids.

name: Adalida
description_html: Sweet Adalida is a beautiful young dog. She is dog friendly, appears housetrained and is easy on leash. She’s very treat motivated and loves fetch. Adalida is trusting and adventurous and is ready to be welcomed into a loving family. Come meet this special girl!

name: Cayenne
description_html: Cayenne is a spicy little pepper, just like her name suggests. She's lived outdoors and may make an excellent mouser or hunter, protecting your property from unwanted guests. Cayenne may enjoy having cat friends to keep her company. She's known the kindness and compassion of a caregiver in her past, and that's what she deserves for her future. We have added her to our Cactus Cat program so she can get extra attention from volunteers and have the safety net of fellow cactus feline friends. Cayenne may do well as a "working cat" or just a cat to support your housecats or join your growing cat family.

name: Mo Mo
description_html:
Mo Mo is honestly the total package- she's sweet, chill, and incredibly adaptable. From day one, she has just fit right in and rolled with the punches. She absolutely adores every human and dog she meets, and her main goal in life is really just to be your absolute best friend.


She’s already crate-trained and is such a quick learner; when treats are involved, she focuses right up, which makes working on training a breeze. On walks, she hits that perfect sweet spot where she's excited to see the world and doesn't pull. Mo Mo loves a good play session with her dog buds to burn off some energy, but she has a great off-switch. As soon as playtime is over, her absolute favorite place to be is crashed out on the couch right next to you! She is just an all-around amazing, low-drama companion who is going to make some lucky family so, so happy.

name: Muffy
description_html:
Muffy is a cutie with a squeaky meow more like a little mouse! She's cute, even if she prefers us to keep our distance at first. She came in with several other cats from an outdoor community where the caregiver passed away.

Muffy seems to get along well with other cats so we've added her to our Cactus Cat program where she can get comfort from cat friends and some confidence building training from volunteers. She's very shy and will likely need a patient, cat savvy adopter to help her through a transition to a home.

Ask about Muffy if you think you can be her special someone!

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Muffy and ALL Desperate Housecats/Cactus Cats!

name: Finley
description_html:
Meet Finley! 🐾 (Or as we like to call him: our “TEMU Shiba Inu” 🐕) Finley is an approximately 1-year-old medium/large mixed breed dog with a sweet personality and so much love to give. After being found as a stray and likely dumped by his previous owners, he’s been working hard learning what it means to feel safe, cared for, and part of a home. 🏡


In his time with us, Finley has made incredible progress:

• Potty-trained and house-broken

• Walks well on a leash, knows “sit,” and is learning additional commands

• Does well when left alone: is non-destructive and minimal barking

• Crate-trained

• Dog friendly and would likely do well with children (unsure about cats)

• Fully vaccinated, microchipped, and neutered


Finley has overcome a lot already, and now he’s ready for a forever home where he can continue to thrive. He’s goofy, loving, eager to learn, and truly deserves a family of his own! 🧡

name: Melos
description_html: Melos found himself in a shelter after years of home life and is fearful of the loud shelter environment. He opens up with some patience and people who will go at his own pace. He has good leash skills, is housetrained, and could live in an apartment or a house. He is truly a softie!

name: Babyboy Da Prince
description_html:
Look at that happy smile! Prince is a striking, chocolate-brown gentleman with the most expressive amber eyes. True to his name, he is absolute royalty when it comes to spreading joy.

Prince perfectly balances an active, playful spirit with a deeply affectionate side. He is always down for a fun game or an outdoor adventure, but his absolute favorite royal decree is the "lean-in." The moment you stop moving, he’ll press his warm, solid self right against your legs, practically begging for cuddles. Ready to welcome this sweet, smiling boy into your home?

name: Molly
description_html: Molly is a sweet, smiley dog who was found roaming near Research Blvd. She adapted to the foster home very quickly and is house trained! She loves belly rubs and is always excited to meet new people. Molly would be an amazing family dog. She loves outside and would be very happy with a yard to play in!

name: Precious
description_html:
Meet Precious — and yes, her name fits her perfectly.


Precious is a 3-year-old sweetheart who is learning that life can be soft, safe, and full of love. Her previous owner made the heartbreaking decision to surrender her due to financial hardship, and before coming to the shelter, Precious spent much of her time the last 3 months living in a backyard. Because of that, new people and environments can feel a little overwhelming at first.


Give her a little patience, though, and you’ll quickly see her true personality shine through. Once Precious feels comfortable, she transforms into an affectionate cuddle bug who will happily curl up in your lap and soak up every bit of love you offer.


She’s a low-energy girl who seems content with the simple things — a comfy bed, a calm home, gentle companionship, and someone she can trust. She also appears to be house trained, making her an easy companion for a lucky adopter.


Precious is looking for a family that understands that some dogs just need a little extra time to bloom. In return, she’ll give you quiet loyalty, sweet cuddles, and a bond that feels truly special.

If you’re searching for a gentle soul to love, Precious may be the perfect addition to your home.

name: Hazel
description_html:
Hi everyone! I'm Hazel. My people had a misfortune and I was alone so I was brought to this new place. The people here are very nice to me, they treat me like the grand lady I am, making me feel really special with the prettiest collar and nice bedding for my woman's size frame. People tell me I have the prettiest eyes, hazel of course. I love to meet people and 'specially like to go for short walks and lounge in the pool. I'm also really good at keeping those dang lizards away from the place too! My friends here said I'm on track to graduate from the senior class but I must find a suitable life mission--I said "I know, I'm trying really hard". So will you please consider me for an indoors job? I'm spayed, heart worm negative and ready to leave as fast as your vehicle travels and I'll keep the little critters away from your place too. Hope to see you soon - with much love waiting, Hazel.

See my short IG video here.

name: Sunny
description_html:
This beautiful flame-point Siamese mix was found alone at a gas station, dirty and exhausted, but still unbelievably sweet and trusting. Even after whatever he’s been through, all he wants is love, soft blankets, and someone to make muffins for.

And yes, he is a professional biscuit maker. The second he gets comfortable, the paws start kneading nonstop. Beds, blankets, laps… everything becomes part of his bakery.


He’s estimated to be around 5 years old and has already charmed everyone he meets with his calm, affectionate personality and stunning blue eyes. He handled vet visits, medications, and care like an absolute gentleman and seems happiest simply being close to people.


Despite a rough start, he has such a soft and loving soul. He’s the kind of cat that quietly follows you around, curls up nearby, and looks at you like he’s just grateful to finally be safe.


If you’re looking for a gentle companion that melts your heart, the Muffin Man is ready for his forever home.

name: Phil
description_html: Cuddly, inquisitive Phil will be a wonderful addition to any home. He's in foster due to an eye infection that is clearing up nicely. Phil is quite, eating well, seems to like our small dogs (doesn't hiss at them when we're on the couch together but no close intros yet) and enjoys playing with toys. Phil is tiny at under 2 lbs.

name: Bucee
description_html:
Bucee was lucky to be picked to go to a foster home for comfort and cool relaxation.

Bucee is neutered, heart worm negative and vaccinated. His hair is so silky soft, indicating he's had a good diet. He's happy and friendly, easy going in the home, is fully house trained, never skips a meal and loves leisurely walks, and trips to the park. He's a great car rider too and he's smart, knowing his sit, down and rollover. He's not into toys and prefers people instead. He loves to sleep on the floor next to his people's bed. How sweet is that?

He stays home alone free-roaming in the house for a couple of hours with no issues and only alert barks when he hears a person coming in the house. Bucee seems to know what a crate is all about and although he doesn't need one, it's good to have the option for traveling to other's homes.. 


Bucee is in the wellness program of Classic Canines. His adoption comes with full medical records and starter preventatives so as not to skip a beat. If you see a great match with Bucee reach out on his link so his foster parents can connect with you.

If you have a resident dog and would like a doggie meet up, that can be arranged through his foster parents and the shelter.


.

name: Contexto
description_html: Contexto is very gentle, loves head scratches and cuddles.

name: Lupe Fiasco
description_html:
Lupe is a 5-year-old sweetheart with a gentle soul and a heart full of love. This handsome boy already knows "sit" and "shake," and he's happy to show off his excellent manners for treats and praise. He absolutely loves people and is happiest when he's snuggled up beside you, soaking up affection and handing out plenty of kisses in return.


Despite being a big dog, Lupe is wonderfully easy to walk on a leash and enjoys getting out for strolls with his favorite humans. He's the kind of companion who is content to be by your side, whether you're relaxing at home, taking a walk around the neighborhood, or settling in for a cozy evening on the couch.


Lupe has the easygoing personality to thrive in either a house or an apartment, as long as he has people to love and a comfortable place to call his own.


If you're looking for a loyal, affectionate best friend who will greet you with kisses and stay close for snuggles, Lupe may be the perfect match for you.

name: Clover
description_html:
Howdy! My name is Clover and I am a calico tabby. I am currently 10 weeks old and am full of energy! I am adventurous, confident and love to play with my foster people. I love to play with my interactive bird toys and take a nice nap after play time! I love to watch and listen to movies, my favorites are The Bee Movie and The Secret Life of Pets. I will likely get along with another playful kitty but have not met any dogs yet. I would love to be adopted and find my forever family that will play and cuddle with me!


Clover is currently pending meet and greet with a potential adopter

This little lady is a little demure and shy, but when she knows you she may snuggle up right next to your face! She is a sweet, loving, kind soul and can't wait to meet her furever family! She is used to other cats and dogs in the house.

name: Belle
description_html:
Meet Belle.


Belle came to the shelter after the heartbreaking loss of her owner. We don't know much about her past, but we do know that she handled the transition to the shelter with remarkable grace. During intake, Belle was calm and well-behaved despite having her whole world turned upside down.


The shelter environment has been much harder on her. Belle is frightened and spends most of her time hiding, often tucking herself behind her bed where she feels safest. It's easy to overlook a scared cat in a kennel, but Belle isn't showing who she truly is right now—she's simply trying to cope with losing the home and person she loved.


What Belle needs most is a patient, caring adopter who can give her the time and security to feel safe again. Once she's back in a quiet home, we believe she'll have the chance to rediscover comfort, trust, and happiness.


Belle has already lost so much. Now she needs someone willing to give her a second chance. Could that someone be you?

name: Panda Bear
description_html:
At 14 years old, Panda Bear recently lost the only home she has ever known when her owner could no longer care for her. After a lifetime of comfort and routine, finding herself in a shelter has been confusing and overwhelming for this sweet senior girl.


Panda Bear spends much of her time tucked safely in her bed, quietly watching the world around her. But beneath her timid shelter demeanor is a cat who has been a beloved companion for many years. She has lived peacefully with other adult cats, has impeccable litter box manners, and enjoys one of life's simple pleasures: sitting by a window and watching the world go by.


The shelter is no place for a cat who has spent 14 years in a home. Whether through adoption or fostering, you could give Panda Bear the security, love, and peace she deserves.

Could you be the one to help Panda Bear feel at home again?

name: Opal
description_html:
Hi, I'm Opal!

I need a helping hand and a place to stay so I can get a fresh start.

Don't let anyone tell you my age is a barrier - I'm here to prove my spirit and will, even though my eyes and ears don't work all that well anymore, I still have a lot of life left to give. I'm a joyful lady. I would like to stay with someone who's joyful like me.

See my short introduction video here

I have people standing by ready to help connect resources for me, isn't that great? Do you want to be my friend and let me stay with you? Reach out onsite to the staff or offsite to caring@classiccanines.org

name: Penny
description_html:
Penny is a boss lady who knows what she wants! And she wants out of this kennel. She also wants to be your only special feline and get all your attention. Penny is a happy girl when she has her special someone to follow around. She loves to watch you cook and go about your daily tasks (aka make sure you're doing it right). This smart girl knows her name and responds to little "kissy" sounds.


Penny is unimpressed with our service here at the shelter, so she may not show you her best side in a kennel. We'd love to see her in a foster home if she doesn't get adopted ASAP!
Super playful, and gregarious. Hungry and healthy. Ready to adopt after vax and neutering on 2026-06-22

name: Bug
description_html: Bug is a big softie. He is a great energy and lovable vibe. He is smart and already knows sit, lay down, shake, and roll over. He looks at you with those soulful eyes. He loves pets and scratches and kisses. While he is a big boy, for sure, he would make either a perfect big or little spoon as you snuggle.

name: Honey Bee
description_html:
Honey Bee is shy when first meeting new people, but she soon decides you are friends and that is where the fun begins!

Honey Bee is hilarious, zooming around a play yard while smacking her own face with a toy. She loves the kiddie pools especially in the Texas heat! Once she burns off a little energy she’s more than content to just come lay down by her human friends and hang out, occasionally asking for a few pets.

Honey Bee seems very house trained and is ready to find a forever family!

We'd love to learn more about her in foster care, or find her a forever home!

name: Lalita
description_html: This sweet, shy girl warms up fast. She loves cuddles and pets and being with you.

name: Jemma
description_html: Jemma has quiet kitty vibes. She enjoys a calm space and won't turn down Churu or other snacks as an offering in exchange for affection. Jemma is a shy girl in the shelter, but with a slow approach she will melt into your hands for pets. She has joined our Cactus Cat program to get extra attention from volunteers and enjoy the company of feline friends. Jemma may do best in a low traffic home with a patient family to help her ease out of her shell.

name: Mariah
description_html: Mariah is a super shy young girl who was being cared for in the community. She was initially shy and friendly for pets in the shelter, but the stress is now getting to her. She is likely to hiss initially and need a slow start. You can make friends with her through Churu! Mariah will need a patient foster or adopter with a starter space with appropriate hiding spots for this timid girl. We can’t wait to see her blossom in a home and get braver every day!

name: Princesa
description_html:
Meet Princesa ~ life tossed her a curve ball when she lost her longtime home due to her owner's hardship, marking the start of a major transition in life.

Princesa is affectionate, house trained, crate trained and walks nicely on a leash. She loves taking walks. She has lived with a male dog about the same size as her for part of her life and shared a kennel at the shelter with a male dog See them together in their kennel here . She's now in a foster home with another dog. She co-exists nicely and respectfully.

She's spayed, vaccinated, heart worm negative. She checks all the boxes of an easy care friend for your home, just click on her inquiry link to check in with her foster provider directly.

She's advocated for by her friends at ClassicCaninesATX who give an extra level of care and support for the mature dogs that are often the most rounded choices for so many homes.

name: Stormy
description_html: Shadow & Stormy are a bonded pair and love each other very much! They should be adopted together.

name: Shadow
description_html: Shadow & Stormy are a bonded pair and love each other very much! They should be adopted together.

name: Diamond
description_html:
Meet Diamond!

Diamond is a sweet, gentle girl with a heart as precious as her name. After spending more than two years in a loving home, she is looking for a new family through no fault of her own after her owner had to move and was unable to take her along.


This friendly pup has lived successfully in an apartment and is both house-trained and paper-trained, with no history of accidents in the home. She has wonderful indoor manners, making her an easy companion to have around the house.

When left alone, Diamond can be trusted to relax freely in the home and has not shown any destructive behaviors.


Diamond's favorite activities include playing fetch, chasing toys, chewing on bones, and carrying around her beloved squeaky toys. She also knows several commands, including sit, stay, come, and shake, and enjoys spending quality time with her people.


Those who know Diamond describe her as incredibly sweet and friendly. She has done well with children and has a calm, gentle nature. While she can be shy around men and may take some time to warm up to unfamiliar people, patience and kindness help her build confidence. She may bark when someone new enters the home and can be a little nervous when approached by strangers on walks, but she has never shown any aggression.


Diamond is also cooperative with handling, allowing baths, nail trims, and being picked up, although she can be a little nervous during bath time. Loud noises and vacuums can be scary for her, so she appreciates a family that understands her sensitive side and can help her feel safe and secure.


She would thrive in a patient, loving home that can give her the time and companionship she deserves. If you're looking for a loyal, gentle companion who enjoys playtime, quiet evenings, and being close to her family, Diamond may be the perfect match for you.


Come meet Diamond and discover what a gem she truly is!

name: Jojo
description_html:
Sweetly shy Jojo is a medium sized dog of just 35 lbs. He was staying with a mature lady a little larger than him in his shelter kennel. They enjoyed each other's company while waiting for the next chapter of their lives to unfold. He's a very respectful partner, tip toeing around and making sure to respect the space of dog and human friends. He's impressionable and very sweet.


Jojo is neutered, vaccinated, easy on a leash and very housetrained. He's ready to go home right away. Jojo can get overly excited in new situations and when meeting new people and may sometimes piddle a bit. We're hoping to get him matched with a person who can help him build more confidence. He'll appreciate having kind, gentle people and dog friends in his sphere of life.


See his little intro video here where he's hamming it up with his kennel side friend Princesa

name: Razzle (Razzi) Dazzle
description_html: Love cuddles and pets. Her voice is a bit raspy but she loves to say hello. Due to a bullet wound to her chest/shoulder area, she had to get an arm removed. She is a lovely tri-pod who is learning to walk again. She is growing in her confidence, good with other cats (non confrontational), and ridiculously sweet. She is still flinches when someone tries to pet her, but she falls right into the love when she realizes she’s safe.

name: Annabelle
description_html:
I'm Annabelle......people tell me I remind them of an old fashioned diner with hotdogs and hamburgers, and rootbeer floats! I can't wait to get to go fun places. I love being with everyone, big and little, humans and dogs, and especially puppies - I love their energy. I love to take walks too.

I'm the perfect companion! I'm affectionate and I love to be petted around the ears! Here I am with my friends here. Older ladies like me are eclectic - I have danglers that are uniquely me. I'm patient for bathing and easy to care for. I'm housetrained and so much fun. I'll keep up with the rest of your crew too. I hope you believe in me cuz I believe in you! Hope I tickle your funny bone-do I? I hope to see you soon.

Love, Annabelle

name: Honey
description_html:
Meet Honey, and her name couldn't be more fitting!

This sweet medium-sized mixed breed girl is as gentle and lovable as they come. Honey walks beautifully on a leash and enjoys getting out and exploring the world by your side. She may occasionally spot a lizard and give chase for a moment, but she's not overly fixated and is happy to move along with her walk.

Honey has also shown what a good sport she is during veterinary visits, handling them with calm and grace. Her easygoing nature and affectionate personality make her a wonderful companion for a variety of homes.

When Honey first arrived, she had a canine friend by her side. While her buddy has already found a forever home, Honey is still waiting for her own happy ending. We'd love to see this deserving girl find a family who will appreciate her sweet disposition and loving heart.

If you're looking for a loyal companion who enjoys walks, takes life's little adventures in stride, and has plenty of love to give, Honey may be the perfect match for you.

name: Taz
description_html:
Meet Taz!


Taz is a lovable, happy-go-lucky young pup who is ready to find his forever family! At just over a year old, this handsome boy is full of energy, affection, and enthusiasm for life. His favorite things include long walks, chewing on his favorite bones, and soaking up attention from the people he loves.


Taz is a friendly, social dog who enjoys meeting new people and has done well with both men and women. He’s lived with a young infant and is described as loving and sweet. One of his favorite ways to show affection is by giving hugs, and he’s always excited to be close to his people.


This smart boy already knows several commands, including sit, stay, and shake. He also has excellent mealtime manners—he can patiently wait for permission before eating until he hears his release cue. Taz is house-trained and crate-trained.


Taz enjoys playing with other dogs. He’s friendly when approached by strangers on walks and generally loves being part of the action.


Thunderstorms and fireworks can make Taz nervous, and car rides aren’t his favorite activity, but with patience and reassurance he settles back in. Because he’s still a young, energetic dog, he’ll thrive with a family that can provide regular exercise and plenty of love.


Taz’s family is making the difficult decision to rehome him due to military housing breed restrictions, not because of any fault of his own. They describe him as very loving, playful, happy, sweet, and devoted.


If you’re looking for a loyal companion who loves hugs, adventures, and being part of the family, Taz may be the perfect match for you!

name: Brock
description_html:
Brock is a good boy, but sometimes worries about his surroundings and new people. He loves food, so sharing time and space with him while he is having a good meal is a great way to build trust. Brock would do best in a quiet household where his new person can give him lots of attention and love while he settles in.


[Siblings are Misty and Ash.]

name: Ash
description_html:
Ash is a good boy with a beautiful blue/grey coat, but needs time to get used to new surroundings. He is a big eater - probably because he is likely going to be a big cat with loooooong legs, and is favorite safe spot is a cozy cat cave. He would do best in a household that will give him time to adjust and learn that his new space is safe.


[Siblings are Misty and Brock]

name: Misty
description_html:
Misty is an adventurous girl who is social once she gets to know you. She has a lovely shiny black coat with a tiiiiiny patch of white on her chest. Misty will let you know when she is hungry, and when she is interested in cuddles. Misty would be best in a household with another furry friend and some activity, but also one that can respect her need for independence.


[Siblings are Ash and Brock.]

name: Annie
description_html: Meet Annie, the World's Cutest House Panther! Annie was found in May hiding in a car engine after a night of storms, just one pound & very scared!  She has spent a few weeks growing in size & confidence in foster care & is ready for her own furrever family. Annie is a true house panther, always active & exploring, snuggling with her people when she is worn out. Annie likes other kitties & will do best with another playful kitten or cat.

name: Smoke
description_html: Sweet girl who loves to cuddle up and purr the day away! She is a professional biscuit maker and just wants to be with her person.

name: Toaster
description_html: Sweet talkative boy who loves people and is happiest curled up on the couch.

name: Tabby
description_html: Sweet girl who loves food and playing with her toys and siblings!

name: Pepper
description_html:
Pepper isn't spicy at all! She's a soft natured, affectionate girl who is currently missing the comfort of sleep in her favorite person's bed. She loves when her person talks to her and gives her pets.

Pepper is very house trained and a pro at staying home alone with her squeaky toy friends.

Pepper is heart worm negative, vaccinated and spayed and ready to leave right away for adoption and foster opportunities. She can't wait to meet you. Meet her onsite or reach out to her advocates at caring@classiccanines.org

Have a dog at home? You can set up a doggie meet and greet at the shelter after meeting Pepper.

name: Gumbo
description_html:
Meet Gumbo 🥘 — a big-hearted, affectionate guy who is ready to trade shelter life for a comfy couch. His previous family described him as "the most loving and affectionate" dog and shared that they had to surrender him only because they could no longer keep him where they lived. They reported that he was house-trained, friendly with people, and happiest spending time with his family.

While shelter life has been tough on Gumbo, volunteers consistently see a different dog once he's out of the kennel. He enjoys sniffy walks, kiddie pool time, treats, pets, and relaxing in the AC. One volunteer even brought him to a meeting, where he politely greeted everyone, settled in, and spent most of the time snoozing. He's easy to handle, enjoys affection, and has earned a reputation as a total sweetheart.

If you’re looking for a loyal companion who loves people, enjoys the simple things in life, and is happiest close to his humans, Gumbo may be the perfect recipe. ❤️

name: Oliver
description_html: Oliver is shy at first but warms up and is quite playful. He likes to fetch and brings the ball back.

name: Nova
description_html:
Nova Bear is an easy going quiet lady. She's an ace at living in an apartment with leashed walks daily. She shared her space nicely with a male cat, staying home alone several hours, free roaming in the apartment with no potty accidents and she never destroyed anything.

Although she's shy in the shelter, she's cuddly and loving after getting to know her person.

Nova Bear is trained for sit, stay and down. She's a gentle walker on leash.

She's also now sharing her space with another dog and building out her experiences.


Nova Bear lost her home due to a hardship. You can find your well trained gem right here - she's waiting for life to restart. Come by to see her or write her advocates at caring@classiccanines.org..

name: Lightning (petco)
description_html: Lightning is a sweet, cuddly, purr machine available for adoption at Petco Oak Hill! Meet her there today!

name: Murphy!
description_html: Murrie is the sweetest boy ever!!! He loves to play with crumpled up paper or any toys you may have for him! And he especially loves his cuddles!! This sweet boy will lay on your chest all day if you let him!! He’s looking to find his forever family so he can shower them with his kisses and purrs!!

name: Blue Moon
description_html:
I’m Blue Moon!


I may be a tad bit shy at first, but we will become besties really soon!


  • I’m very housetrained
  • I know “sit”, “down”, “stay”, and “come”
  • I walk well on leash
  • I to do a little cuddling
  • I am a blast!


Come meet me today!

name: Charming
description_html: Prepare to be charmed! Just like his name suggests, this boy will make you swoon. He's affectionate, and easy going, and it's always snuggle time if you allow it. Charming is looking for a little luxury in his life. He's had it tough outdoors for awhile, but he'd much prefer the security of a caring home. Don't let this endearing boy, with his soft chirps and his tongue that sometimes pops out, be the one that got away. Adopt Charming today!

name: Lucy (goose)
description_html: We don't have anything but nice things to say about Lucy Goose! She's a cuddly, affectionate lap cat who has spent time with dogs and cats in the home. She's the perfect balance of accepting attention without craving it all the time. This laid back girl is content to hang out with you or be in your lap. Lucy Goose also is curious about her world and enjoys exploring it. Despite her older years, she can still get active and playful. Meet Lucy today and try not to fall in love - we don't think it's possible.

name: Baby Ruth
description_html: "We took in Baby Ruth after a close friend passed away from cancer and left behind two dogs. We were able to find a permanent home for one dog, but despite over two years of trying, we have been unable to find one for Baby Ruth. Our family is growing (there are 4 children), and with two dogs and a cat of our own (she got along great with all)." Current day: Baby Ruth's life has been abruptly interrupted twice and she's now in a shelter. She's well rounded with dogs, cats and kids and can be in many different homes. We want to match her quickly with a well suited home of friendship. She stayed alone home for 4-8 hrs at a time, free roaming indoors, with no potty accidents and she's non-destructive. She doesn't react to dogs or people on walks. She walks easy and loves her walks. She likes to have a dog bed to lay on, and she likes squeaky toys. She asks only for love and care. She loves pets and snuggles a d will follow you everywhere and sit on your feet. Shell also give you wet kisses from time to time. Stop by to meet her or write her advocates at caring@classiccanines.org

name: Meowsy
description_html: Meowsy loves being held and cuddled. Try to ignore her and she will scream at you. Good luck protecting your heart from this girl; she will steal it!

name: Blossom (petco)
description_html: Blossom is an easy going girl who loves pets and attention! She will meow for a little love and accept whatever you are willing to give her. Blossom was found trying to survive outdoors with the kindness of neighbors, but she would prefer to lounge on your sofa and have all the comforts of a real home. She has been relaxed around other cats in the shelter so may do well in a home with feline friends. All you have to do is meet her to fall in love with her!

name: Cody
description_html:
Meet Cody! This sweet 1½-year-old pup came to the shelter with his brother and is now ready to find a loving home of his own. Cody enjoys taking in the world one sniff at a time and loves long hikes where he can explore all the interesting sights and smells around him. Volunteers think he has potential to be a running buddy as well!


While he can be a little shy at first, Cody warms up with patience and kindness and quickly shows his affectionate side. He’s incredibly cuddly and loves being close to his people once he feels comfortable.


If you’re looking for a gentle, loving dog with a sweet personality and lots of potential, Cody is ready to steal your heart!

name: Wrangler
description_html:
Wrangler is affection and friendly with all the people he's met. He's not over the top with toys and balls and loves affections. He has a bit of a signature crumpled ear.

Some fast facts about our sweetie:

--Very housetrained--Crate trained


Wrangler reserves the right to do what cattle dogs do best, wrangle up furry friends. If you have a resident dog a meet and greet can be set up with staff. Absolute angel just wants to be close and relax.

name: Knox
description_html:
Knox is a very happy-go-lucky boy who was found on the streets wearing a green harness and dragging a green leash. We wish we knew his story. He stayed two months with a foster finder. while awaiting an intake appointment. He didn't live with other animals during that time. He stayed home alone 9-12 hours free roaming without ever causing any troubles.

Knox has been staying in the crate room at the shelter and frankly he's pretty over that arrangement. He's not a fan lately of returning to his crate. We can't blame him. It's not comfortable to stay in 24 hrs a day. And Knox likes his precious sleep - at about 8pm he simply reserves the right to rest and not have to get up and go out.

Knox had a fresh bath on 6/13 and his coat is so gorgeous and silky black. We would love to get him back into a cool and comfy home ASAP. See his intro video here

Are you ready to help Knox? Come in person between 11-6.

Offsite questions? Reach out to his advocates at caring@classiccanines.org

name: Zack
description_html:
Meet Zack! This sweet boy is the perfect mix of playful energy and loving affection. On walks, Zack enjoys taking his time to sniff around and explore, and he’s easy to handle on leash since he’s not a strong puller.


In the yard, Zack is less interested in toys and more interested in having fun with his people and dog friends. He loves zooming around for a burst of excitement, then happily settling in for cuddles and affection. Zack is incredibly sweet-natured and thrives on love and attention. He’s a big fan of giving kisses and absolutely adores hugs, making him a wonderful companion for anyone looking for a dog who truly loves being close to his humans.


If you’re searching for a dog with a gentle heart, playful spirit, and lots of affection to share, Zack is ready to meet you!


Zack is heart worm negative!

name: Melvin
description_html:
Meet Melvin! This handsome 2-year-old boy is equal parts explorer and cuddlebug. On walks, Melvin enjoys taking his time to meander, sniff all the interesting smells, and happily say hello to new people along the way. He loves puzzle toys, outdoor adventures, and anything that keeps his curious mind busy.


Melvin is silly, sweet, affectionate, and very treat motivated, which makes bonding with him extra fun. One of his favorite things in the world? Butt scratches! They’re the quickest way to earn his happy wiggles. He’s also dog friendly and would enjoy having canine pals to hang out with.


If you’re looking for a lovable companion with a gentle spirit, playful personality, and lots of love to give, Melvin may be your perfect match!

name: Leo
description_html: Leo is a sensitive soul waiting for his purrfect match. He's affectionate and loves pets, and will gladly lounge in your lap if offered. Leo may be shy in the shelter, but in a home you can pick him up and hold him close for cuddles. Unfortunately, his family was allergic to him so they had to give up this snuggly boy. Now, he's looking for a new lap to curl up in and open arms to accept and cherish him!

name: Sirius
description_html: When Sirius first arrived at the shelter, he was clearly unimpressed with our accommodations and service. But, since then he's come to see that we are trying our very best to make him feel welcome! And, in turn he has started giving us head butts and asking for pets every chance he gets. This soft boy is very affectionate and also loves to play! His favorite toys are wand toys and mice he can chase around. And, don't forget the catnip because he has a bit of a problem...Sirius is ready to run free in a home today!

name: Piper
description_html: Piper is a very sweet dog, affectionate and friendly. She is crate trained.

name: Mittens
description_html:
Bond & Mittens had to be surrendered due to allergies. They are both affectionate and friendly cats who may not show their true personalities in the shelter due to stress. Bond is an absolute snuggler and likes to groom his favorite people to show he cares. In a home, he loves to be cradled like a baby in your arms and get his cheeks rubbed. Mittens is on the quieter side. She lets her brother speak for both of them! She's content to curl up in your lap for TV time and snuggle under the covers when it's lights out. These babies are truly scared in the shelter and would love to go to foster together if not adopted soon!


Bond & Mittens are a bonded pair and should go home together!

name: Eddy
description_html:
Meet Eddy — sweet, savvy, and ready to be your new best friend. He's the kind of dog who keeps life fun without making it complicated. Affectionate to his core, Eddy genuinely loves his people and makes sure you know it, whether that's through a well-earned trick or simply leaning in for a cuddle at the end of the day.

Eddy is a polished loose-leash walker — walks with him are genuinely enjoyable, no wrestling required. Toss a ball and watch him light up; fetch is his love language. He's treat-motivated and already has a repertoire of tricks up his sleeve, which makes for a great party guest and an even better training partner.

Fair warning: Eddy has a keen eye for lizards and will absolutely stop mid-walk to investigate any rustling in the bushes. It's part of his charm. When the hunt is over, he's all yours — affectionate, calm, and very much in the mood to cuddle.

name: Bond
description_html:
Bond & Mittens had to be surrendered due to allergies. They are both affectionate and friendly cats who may not show their true personalities in the shelter due to stress. Bond is an absolute snuggler and likes to groom his favorite people to show he cares. In a home, he loves to be cradled like a baby in your arms and get his cheeks rubbed. Mittens is on the quieter side. She lets her brother speak for both of them! She's content to curl up in your lap for TV time and snuggle under the covers when it's lights out. These babies are truly scared in the shelter and would love to go to foster together if not adopted soon!


Bond & Mittens are a bonded pair and should go home together!

name: Bella
description_html:
Bella is one of the sweet, gentle Classic ladies who is staying in the crate overflow room, a prime location for fosters and adopters to meet a new dog in need of your cool comfortable home.


She's very easy on a leash and seems very house trained. In the play yard she's an independent spirit and likes to saunter through the pool to cool down her paws. She seems intrigued by squeaky toys.


Stop by to meet her and see if she's the perfect speed and fit for your lifestyle.

name: Batman
description_html:
Meet Batman!


Batman is a 1½-year-old bundle of love, energy, and personality who is looking for his forever family!


Batman lost the only family he has ever known due to a move. Once Batman trusts you, he is incredibly affectionate and thrives on attention, cuddles, and playtime. His favorite things include fetch, tug-of-war, wrestling with dog friends, squeaky toys, walks, and chasing around the yard. He’s playful, goofy, and always ready to have fun, but he also has a sweet snuggly side and happily curls up for lap time with the people he loves.


He gets along well with other dogs. Batman can be shy or nervous around unfamiliar people at first, but once he feels safe, his loving personality shines through.


Batman is neutered, healthy, house-trained, and used to family life. He’s described as loving, playful, smart, and highly trainable — the kind of dog who bonds deeply with his people and wants to be involved in everything they do.


If you’re looking for a fun-loving, affectionate young dog with a big heart and lots of potential, Batman may be the perfect addition to your family!

name: Alayna
description_html: Little Alayna is *staff only* - please check in with them for further information.

name: Reed
description_html:
This sweet boy was living in a community for many months and was brought to AAS because he was begging for food and losing weight. It is believed that his owners moved and left him behind. We don’t know much about him, although he has been very calm and friendly since his arrival.

He seems very social and used to being around humans, and he may be a lap cat. All he really wants is three squares a day, some love, and a warm bed to sleep in at night, either through adoption or foster. He may be fine with other cats.

The adoption fee is waived for ALL Desperate Housecats!

name: Jelly Donut
description_html: This giant gent topping 150 lbs is completely mobile and loves an opportunity to get out and see and explore. He's nice on a leash and seems neutral, relaxed and friendly toward dogs he encounters, both small and large..He was sadly abandoned and then brought here for his safety, so we have no home history for him and are still learning all about this sweet boy. Stop by to meet him in person.
